nasb.text: Then Samuel took Saul and his servant and brought them into the hall and gave them a place at the head of those who were invited, who were about thirty men.

esv.text: Then Samuel took Saul and his young man and brought them into the hall and gave them a place at the head of those who had been invited, who were about thirty persons.

cnv.text: 撒母耳把掃羅和掃羅的僕人領進了客廳，使他們坐在客人中的首位；那裡約有三十人。

ccb.text: 撒母耳带着扫罗和他的仆人来到一个大厅，让他们在请来的三十位客人中坐上座。
